metadata.description: Challenges validating concurrent access patterns across format parsers, protocol connections, and shared resources

challenges.name: Concurrent Format Parsing (10 Threads)
challenges.description: Verify that 10 threads can simultaneously parse different text formats without data corruption, race conditions, or crashes. Each thread parses a distinct format (Markdown, CSV, LaTeX, Org Mode, TodoTxt, WikiText, AsciiDoc, RST, Textile, Creole).

outputs.name: completed_threads
outputs.description: Number of threads that completed successfully

outputs.name: parse_results
outputs.description: Parse result per thread including format ID and validity

outputs.name: data_corruption_detected
outputs.description: Whether any cross-thread data corruption was detected

assertions.message: Every thread must produce a valid ParsedDocument

challenges.name: Concurrent Protocol Connections
challenges.description: Verify that multiple protocol services (Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive, FTP, WebDAV) can be connected and disconnected concurrently without deadlocks or state corruption. Tests stateMutex-protected state transitions under contention.

outputs.name: connection_results
outputs.description: Result of each connect/disconnect cycle per protocol

outputs.name: final_state_consistent
outputs.description: Whether all services ended in a consistent state

outputs.name: deadlock_detected
outputs.description: Whether any deadlock was detected during operations

assertions.message: All protocol services must end in a consistent state
No deadlocks allowed during concurrent protocol operations
All connection operations must complete without exceptions

challenges.name: Deadlock Detection Under High Contention
challenges.description: Verify the system is free of deadlocks when 200 coroutines simultaneously access ParserRegistry, FormatRegistry, and ParsedDocument HTML caching. Uses a 10-second timeout as a deadlock detection mechanism.

outputs.name: completed_within_timeout
outputs.description: Whether all coroutines completed before the timeout

outputs.name: timeout_exceeded
outputs.description: Whether the timeout was exceeded (indicates potential deadlock)

assertions.message: All coroutines must complete within timeout (no deadlock)

challenges.name: Race Condition Detection in Parser Registry
challenges.description: Verify that concurrent register/unregister/lookup operations on ParserRegistry do not produce inconsistent state. Interleaves register, getParser, hasParser, and clear operations across 50 coroutines to expose potential race conditions in the platformSynchronized lock.

outputs.name: exceptions_thrown
outputs.description: Any unexpected exceptions during concurrent operations

outputs.name: operations_completed
outputs.description: Total number of operations completed successfully

assertions.message: No state inconsistencies allowed under concurrent access
No unexpected exceptions during concurrent operations

challenges.name: Lock Contention Measurement
challenges.description: Measure lock contention on ParserRegistry and ParsedDocument HTML cache under escalating concurrency levels (1, 10, 50, 100 coroutines). Verify that throughput degrades gracefully rather than collapsing under contention, and that p99 latency remains bounded.

outputs.name: throughput_by_level
outputs.description: Operations per second at each concurrency level

outputs.name: p99_latency_by_level
outputs.description: p99 latency in ms at each concurrency level

outputs.name: degradation_factor
outputs.description: Ratio of throughput at max vs min concurrency

assertions.message: Throughput measurements must be collected at all levels
Latency measurements must be collected at all levels
Throughput at max concurrency must be at least 10% of single-threaded throughput
